positive: Minimalist, high-contrast vector illustration of a stylized celestial whale breaching through geometric waves. The whale features elegant, streamlined silhouettes accented by constellations and milky nebula dust trails. The waves are rendered in bold, repeating geometric patterns (triangles, chevrons). Color palette: Deep indigo, cosmic violet, warm gold, and bright cyan, limited to these four colors for optimal print contrast. Composition is centered and dynamic, designed to wrap around a garment. Flat design aesthetic with strong outlines and excellent separation of elements. Highly detailed vector quality.
negative: blur, noise, artifact, watermark, signature, text, logo, realistic, 3d render, gradient wash, muted, bad anatomy, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, ugly, messy, low contrast
